_README: Cortex projesinde DB iceren senaryolar yazildiginda buraya SQL eklenir.
_format: key = SQL stringi. Parametre: '?' placeholder. Step'ten parametre virgulle gecirilir.
_example_value: SELECT id, username FROM users WHERE email = ?
selectUserByEmail: SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE email = ?
selectUserById: SELECT id, username, email FROM users WHERE id = ?
